svg.text: Animated walkthrough of the agentic loop ⋅ Memory → Perception → Decision → Action

g.text: argparse → query + flags ⋅ --clean wipes state/ via clean_state()
run_id = uuid4()[:8] ⋅ require_gemini_configured() ⋅ start perf timer
store the user query into durable memory (state_dir)
retrieve the 12 most relevant memory hits
build observation ⋅ prior_goals feeds back into the next pass
load each goal attachment id via ArtifactStore.get_text()
branch — return a final answer, or call a tool?
append HistoryEvent(action) ⋅ result_text kept if ≤ 4096 B
scan history in reverse → the most recent answer event
when trace: print FINAL panel ⋅ execution-trace tree ⋅ total time

svg.text: Box colours mirror the rich-console palette defined in _label() ⋅ the staggered glow halos trace execution order.
The indigo channel carries CONTINUE (next iteration); the rose channel carries BREAK (leave the loop).
